title: Capacity Alert/Notification for Users
excerpt: Currently, there is no functionality to alert or notify users to when colleagues are about to go over their set capacity of tasks or working hours. This means people can continue assigning tasks to colleagues when there’…

posts.author: dburton4 (Douglas Burton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, there is no functionality to alert or notify users to when colleagues are about to go over their set capacity of tasks or working hours. This means people can continue assigning tasks to colleagues when there’s no likelihood they’ll be able to carry out the task.

It would be good to configure a simple alert to notify the user of this

posts.author: joanneteh (Joanne Teh)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone managed to get this notification to work? Workload widget notifying that if a person workload has become red would be really essential for Project Managers isn’t it?

posts.author: david5 (clarks)
posts.cookedHtml: The workload widget notification works if properly configured. Ensure alerts are enabled and thresholds are set correctly. It’s crucial for project managers to track workload balance efficiently.
